# EF Core — Daily DevOps & .NET

> Entity Framework Core articles covering migrations, model configuration, performance, and advanced patterns for .NET applications using EF Core.

Source: https://daily-devops.net/tags/efcore/
Generated: 2026-07-18

## About this topic

- [Topic landing page](https://daily-devops.net/tags/efcore/): Entity Framework Core articles covering migrations, model configuration, performance, and advanced patterns for .NET applications using EF Core.
- [Back to all topics](https://daily-devops.net/tags/)
- [Site index](https://daily-devops.net/llms.txt)

## Articles tagged "EF Core" (2)

- [EF Core Plugins: Owning Migrations with ExcludeFromMigrations](https://daily-devops.net/posts/efcore-excludefrommigrations-2-the-solution/): ExcludeFromMigrations keeps plugin entities queryable in the host while stripping migration ownership. The full three-layer architecture and the FK gotcha.
- [EF Core Plugins: When Migrations Go Wrong](https://daily-devops.net/posts/efcore-excludefrommigrations-1-the-problem/): When a host DbContext discovers plugin entities, it hijacks their migrations. Here is why EF Core entity discovery causes this and what breaks.
